metadata.description: Reusable OpenTelemetry agent skills (language-agnostic and per-language)

plugins.name: otel-declarative-config
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry declarative YAML configuration for SDK setup (otelconf, OTEL_CONFIG_FILE, file_format). Points at upstream schema, env-var substitution, and configuration precedence.

plugins.name: otel-ottl
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry Transformation Language (OTTL) expert for writing and debugging telemetry transformations in the Collector (transform, filter, routing, tail_sampling).

plugins.name: otel-sdk-versions
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry SDK and package version lookup across languages.

plugins.name: otel-semantic-conventions
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry semantic convention lookup and naming guidance for attributes, groups, and span naming.

plugins.name: otel-span-events-to-logs-migration
plugins.description: Migrate OpenTelemetry Span Events (AddEvent, RecordException) to the Logs API following the OTEP 4430 deprecation plan.

plugins.name: otel-telemetrygen
plugins.description: Construct telemetrygen commands for generating synthetic OpenTelemetry traces, metrics, and logs via OTLP; load-test collectors and validate pipelines.

plugins.name: otel-weaver
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry Weaver registry authoring, codegen, and CI enforcement (registry check/generate/diff).

plugins.name: otel-go
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry in Go: declarative SDK setup with otelconf, API surface, contrib instrumentation libraries (otelhttp, otelgrpc), performance tuning, breaking-change audits.

plugins.name: otel-java
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry in Java: Javaagent zero-code instrumentation, Spring Boot Starter, manual autoconfigure SDK, declarative YAML configuration, BOM dependency management.

plugins.name: otel-js
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry in Node.js / JavaScript / TypeScript: NodeSDK, declarative YAML configuration, auto-instrumentations, ESM vs CJS import patterns.
